# 1-digit numbers: 1, 2, ..., 9
    # 2-digit numbers: 10, 11, ..., 99
    # 3-digit numbers: 100, 101, ..., 999
    # ...
    # n-digit numbers: 10^(n-1), 10^(n-1) + 1, ..., 10^n - 1
    #
    # Count of n-digit numbers that start with 1: 10^(n-1)
    # Count of n-digit numbers that end with 1: 10^(n-1)
    # Count of n-digit numbers that start and end with 1: 10^(n-2)
    #
    # Total count: 10^(n-1) + 10^(n-1) - 10^(n-2)
    #             = 2 * 10^(n-1) - 10^(n-2)
    #             = 10^(n-2) * (20 - 1)
    #             = 19 * 10^(n-2)
    return 19 * 10**(n - 2) if n > 1 else 1
